title: Framed Glass Panes
description: Adds medieval themed framed glass pane textures while leaving the glass blocks unchanged. Compatible with OptiFine and Continuity
body:
# Hello There
This small resource pack adds custom glass pane textures which basically use the vanilla glass and add a frame to it. The glass block texture is unchanged, so using a ton of white stained glass in technical builds looks still as intended. Glass panes render their sides to make the frame more prominet. Clear glass panes connect textures, like all glass blocks, since this pack contains Continuity's built-in resource pack for connected textures and also works with OptiFine. 

Get a quick overview in this video from 6:43 to 7:43:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Have a look at the gallery for a better overview.

### I created optional versions of the pack:
- [Framed Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/framed-glass): All colored glass blocks and panes use the new frame texture (except for regular and tinted glass)
- [Framed Glass Blocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/framed-glass-blocks): Only colored glass blocks are changed. Glass panes will connect when using Continuity

### Credit
If you have any feedback, feel free to join my Discord and let me know.
Make sure to check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile as well :D
